sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Alexander Aphrodisiensis</hi> Philosophus [Alex.Aphr.] <date TEIform="date">iii A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">de An. = de Anima liber,</title_> ed. I. Bruns (<title_ TEIform="title">Supplementum Aristotelicum</title_> ii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1887. <title_ TEIform="title">Fat. = de Fato,</title_> ed. I. Bruns (<title_ TEIform="title">Supplementum Aristotelicum</title_> ii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1892. <title_ TEIform="title">Febr. = de febribus,</title_> ed. J. L. Ideler, <title_ TEIform="title">Physici et Medici Graeci Minores,</title_> Berlin 1841, i p. 81. <title_ TEIform="title">in APr. = in Aristotelis Analyticorum Priorum librum I com- mentarium,</title_> ed. M. Wallies (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> ii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1883. <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph. = in Aristotelis Metaphysica commentaria,</title_> ed. M. Hayduck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> i), Berlin 1891. <title_ TEIform="title">in Mete. = in Aristotelis Meteorologicorum libros commentaria,</title_> ed. M. Hayduck (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> iii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1899. <title_ TEIform="title">in SE = in Aristotelis Sophisticos Elenchos commentarium,</title_> ed. M. Wallies (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> ii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iii), Berlin 1898. <title_ TEIform="title">in Sens. = in librum de sensu commentarium,</title_> ed. P. Wendland (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> iii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i), Berlin 1901. <title_ TEIform="title">in Top. = in Aristotelis Topicorum libros octo commentaria,</title_> ed. M. Wallies (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> ii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1891. <title_ TEIform="title">Mixt. = de Mixtione,</title_> ed. I. Bruns (<title_ TEIform="title">Supplementum Aristotelicum</title_> ii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1892. <title_ TEIform="title">Pr. = Problemata,</title_> ed. J. L. Ideler, <title_ TEIform="title">Physici et Medici Graeci Minores,</title_> Berlin 1841, i p. 3. <title_ TEIform="title">Pr.Anecd.</title_> = <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προβλήματα ἀνέκδοτα,</foreign> ed. U. Cats Bussemaker, <title_ TEIform="title">Aristo- telis Opera,</title_> vol. iv (Paris (D.) 1857), p. 291. <title_ TEIform="title">Quaest. = Quaestiones,</title_> ed. I. Bruns (<title_ TEIform="title">Supplementum Aristotelicum</title_> ii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii), Berlin 1892.</item>
